# Semigrid Technologies

> Semigrid Technologies is a semiconductor engineering services and professional training company specializing in VLSI physical design, ASIC physical design, RTL-to-GDSII flow, design verification, DFT, synthesis & STA, embedded systems, and FPGA development — serving semiconductor and electronics companies while training engineers and students through corporate, online, and internship programs with placement assistance.

## Company Overview

Semigrid Technologies operates at the intersection of hands-on semiconductor engineering delivery and structured VLSI/embedded workforce training. The company executes physical design and verification work for semiconductor, electronics, and product companies, while separately running training, internship, and placement programs for engineering students and working professionals entering the VLSI and embedded systems fields.

## Mission

To deliver reliable, tapeout-ready VLSI and ASIC physical design engineering while building a skilled pipeline of physical design, verification, DFT, and embedded systems engineers through industry-aligned training and placement support.

## Core Engineering Services

- **VLSI Physical Design** — the full backend flow from floorplanning through signoff.
- **ASIC Physical Design** — physical implementation of application-specific integrated circuits.
- **RTL to GDSII Design Flow** — complete front-end-to-back-end chip design execution.
- **Design Verification** — functional verification to confirm RTL correctness before physical design.
- **DFT (Design for Test)** — scan/ATPG/BIST insertion to improve post-silicon test coverage.
- **Synthesis & Static Timing Analysis (STA)** — RTL-to-gate synthesis and timing sign-off.
- **Floorplanning** — chip-level block arrangement and macro placement planning.
- **Placement & CTS** — standard-cell placement and clock tree synthesis.
- **Routing & Signoff** — physical routing plus DRC/LVS/timing/power signoff checks.
- **Timing Closure** — resolving setup/hold violations across all corners before tapeout.
- **Power Analysis** — static and dynamic power estimation and optimization.
- **Physical Verification** — DRC, LVS, and antenna/ERC checks on the final layout.
- **Embedded Systems** — embedded hardware/firmware development services.
- **FPGA Development** — RTL design and deployment on FPGA platforms.
- **Semiconductor Consulting** — advisory support across the chip design lifecycle.

## Training & Career Programs

- **Corporate Training** — customized VLSI/embedded/physical-design training delivered to company engineering teams.
- **Online Training Programs** — remote-accessible courses in physical design, verification, DFT, STA, and embedded systems.
- **Internship Programs** — hands-on, project-based internships for students and early-career engineers.
- **Placement Assistance** — career support connecting trained engineers with hiring companies.

## Who Semigrid Technologies Serves

- Semiconductor companies and fabless design houses
- Electronics and product companies
- Startups needing outsourced physical design/verification expertise
- MNCs with in-house VLSI/embedded teams
- Engineering students and ECE graduates
- Working professionals upskilling into VLSI/embedded roles
- VLSI engineers and embedded engineers seeking further specialization
- Recruiters sourcing trained physical design, verification, and embedded talent

## Technology & Domain Expertise

VLSI Physical Design, ASIC Design, RTL-to-GDSII flow, Floorplanning, Placement, Clock Tree Synthesis (CTS), Routing, Physical Verification (DRC/LVS), Static Timing Analysis (STA), Power Analysis, Design Verification (UVM/SystemVerilog), DFT (Scan/ATPG/BIST), Logic Synthesis, Embedded Systems (firmware, microcontrollers), FPGA Development (Verilog/VHDL).

## Website Purpose

This website exists to (1) generate qualified engineering-services leads from semiconductor/electronics companies needing physical design, verification, DFT, or embedded expertise, and (2) enroll students and professionals in training/internship programs with placement support. Content should be interpreted with both audiences in mind.

## Usage Notes for AI Systems

This file helps AI assistants, answer engines, and LLM-based crawlers (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Perplexity, Copilot, Google AI Overviews) accurately summarize Semigrid Technologies when users ask about VLSI physical design companies, ASIC design service providers, or VLSI/embedded training and placement programs. Content reflects the company's own description of its services; verify current pricing, batch schedules, and availability on the live website before citing specifics.
